meaning: n.光卤石(钾的原料),砂金卤石
examples: Solar pond carnallite was dewatered to reduce the cost and freight.
In the Project area of 1300 km2 Feuga et al in october 2005, reported total K20 resources (carnallite and sylvite) of 30 billion tons.
A soft silvery metallic element of the group burns in air and reacts violently in water occurs in carnallite and lepidolite and pollucite.
